=== 2002 tape info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 
10/30/75, 
Plymouth, MA,

New emerged tape - 2002


1 When I Paint My Masterpiece, 
2 It Ain't Me, Babe, 
3 A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall, 
4 Romance In Durango (Levy/Dylan), 
5 Isis (Dylan/Levy), 
6 The Times They Are A-Changin', 
7 Never Let Me Go (Joseph C Scott), 
8 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll, 
9 I Shall Be Released [cut], 

10 Diamonds and Rust (Baez)
11 Swing Low Sweet Chariot - accapella (Baez)
12 Love Song to a Stranger (Baez)
13 Joe Hill (Baez)
14 Oh Happy Day (Baez)
15 Please Come To Boston (Baez)
16 Chestnut Mare (McGuinn)
17 The Night They Drove Old Dixie Down (Baez et al.)

18 Mr. Tambourine Man, 
19 Oh Sister (Dylan/Levy), 
20 Hurricane [cut] (Levy/Dylan)
